query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%tax%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%mode%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%tax%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%mode%');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
sender_tax_id	varchar
tax_mode	enum
tax_amount	decimal
